MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. PTJ: Irving Pfeffer, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Valerie Papale. Daniel Bornstein, Esq. represented Plaintiff Richard Chiu and Tyre McElle appeared in pro per. Case settled per written stipulation on the record. Trial date is vacated.
